description: Link compounds to protein targets, rank bioactivity, and look up drug mechanisms and indications.
name: io.github.cyanheads/chembl-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'duckdb' to enable the bioactivity DataCanvas spill and the chembl_dataframe_* SQL tools. When 'none', large bioactivity sets inline a preview but never spill.
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the ChEMBL REST data API. Override for a private mirror or pinned host.
environmentVariables.name: CHEMBL_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Per-request timeout in milliseconds for upstream ChEMBL fetches.
environmentVariables.name: CHEMBL_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_MS

environmentVariables.description: ChEMBL per-page cap when streaming activity pages for the bioactivity spill (max 1000).
environmentVariables.name: CHEMBL_MAX_PAGE_SIZE

environmentVariables.description: Default result limit applied when callers omit it.
environmentVariables.name: CHEMBL_DEFAULT_LIMIT

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to register the opt-in chembl_dataframe_drop tool (absent from tools/list when off).
environmentVariables.name: CHEMBL_DATAFRAME_DROP_ENABLED
